# Content

Back to [Gnosis](../README.md)

This directory holds manuscript-facing and publication-facing content served by
the research surface. It is not the canonical home for proofs, ledgers, Lean
modules, or TLA+ specs.

## Getting Started

- **What:** manuscript-facing content and publication metadata connected to the Gnosis research surface.
- **Why:** it keeps papers, companion notes, and publication proof files near the code and proof artifacts they describe.
- **How:** update these files when the published narrative or companion-test explanation changes; use the formal ledgers for canonical proof claims.
- **Next:** read the listed manuscript or companion file, then cross-check formal claims in the root ledgers.

The canonical formal surface lives in [../FORMAL_LEDGER.md](../FORMAL_LEDGER.md)
and [../THEOREM_LEDGER.md](../THEOREM_LEDGER.md).

- [ch17-arxiv-manuscript.md](./ch17-arxiv-manuscript.md): Chapter 17 manuscript mirror.
- [military-strategy-topology-course.md](./military-strategy-topology-course.md): the military-strategy-via-topology corpus course (companion to `gnosis-math/Gnosis/MilitaryStrategy/`).
- [companion-tests-README.md](./companion-tests-README.md): manuscript-facing companion-check notes.
- [ch17-publish-proof.json](./ch17-publish-proof.json): content hash and publication metadata for the Chapter 17 manuscript artifact.
